description_long: This is a medieval-style helmet made of dark, metallic material, featuring two large, spiraled brown horns protruding from each side. The front of the helmet has a pronounced vertical ridge and angular eye slits, giving it an intimidating appearance. There is a small red shield emblem with a white fleur-de-lis on the lower left cheek area. The lower front section has a grid of small ventilation holes arranged in a triangular pattern. The helmet's surface is matte and slightly rough, with visible wear and subtle texture variations. The interior is likely hollow to accommodate a human head.
description: A dark metal medieval helmet with large brown spiral horns, angular eye slits, and a red shield emblem with a fleur-de-lis.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular eye slits, central ridge, ventilation holes, and the red shield emblem with a fleur-de-lis.
description_view_1: Left rear three-quarter view highlighting the left horn and the helmet's smooth, rounded back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both spiral horns and the plain, unadorned back of the helmet.
description_view_3: Right rear three-quarter view focusing on the right horn and the helmet's curvature.
attribute_brand_logo: A red shield emblem with a white fleur-de-lis is present on the lower left cheek area.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: A grid of small, round ventilation holes arranged in a triangular pattern on the lower right front side.
attribute_graphic_design: Features a red shield with a white fleur-de-lis emblem; otherwise, the helmet is plain with no additional graphics.
